metadata.description: Python domain extension with pyprojectx build operations

skill:ext-triage-python.description: Triage extension for Python findings during plan-finalize phase

skill:pytest-testing.description: Use when writing, reviewing, or debugging Python tests — covers pytest framework, AAA pattern, fixtures, parametrization, isolation, mocking, assertions, and coverage configuration. Activate for any Python testing task.

skill:python-core.description: Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Python 3.10+ code — covers type annotations, data structures, error handling, resource management, async patterns, naming conventions, and imports. Activate for any Python production code task. Also use when working with pathlib, dataclass, pydantic, match statements, or structural pattern matching.
